assets.alt: Two flat head-on liquid-glass workflow lanes on a pale blue and turquoise mesh background
assets.caption: Employee advocacy helps a company message travel. Employee-generated content turns real employee expertise into public learning.
assets.generation_method: built-in image_gen, saved post-local as PNG
assets.notes: Regenerated with the flat head-on two-color Sell In Public liquid-glass hero process. Background uses one main color plus one close complementary color; graphic is front-facing with no isometric or angled perspective.
assets.final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: wide blog hero for Sell In Public blog, final should work as a 1600x700 landscape crop
Source context from article: Employee-generated content starts with employee expertise: work employees have done, questions they hear, lessons they have learned, examples they can explain, and judgments they can defend. Employee advocacy starts with a company-approved message or asset and asks employees to help distribute it. The article explains that these two approaches can work together, but they need different workflows, review standards, and metrics.
Primary request: Create one simple visual metaphor inferred from that article context: two different content operating paths that should not be forced into one workflow. Use one or two relevant visual elements only: two front-facing flat liquid-glass lanes with a small shared checkpoint.
Style reference: Sell In Public Flat Liquid Mesh Hero style. Generated raster PNG. Background uses one main color plus at most one close complementary color. Matte translucent liquid-glass shapes. Simple head-on flat UI. Consistent white outline weight. Clean negative space. Subtle grain.
Composition: Wide landscape hero near 1600x700. One centered head-on graphic with quiet space around it. All glass/white graphics must be completely flat and viewed straight-on, like 2D interface strips parallel to the image plane.
Scene/backdrop: Soft mesh gradient using only pale blue and turquoise. No third color family. Blend smoothly without hard edges.
Subject: Two horizontal front-facing flat liquid-glass lanes, one above the other or side by side, with one small shared checkpoint shape. Sparse white outline marks only. No labels, no words, no metrics.
Detail density: Very low. Simple, spacious, specific, editorial B2B.
Constraints: Generated raster PNG style only. No readable text, logos, watermarks, exact LinkedIn UI, fake metrics, charts, scattered nodes, random lines, icon clouds, fake dashboards, overcomplicated UIs, generic LinkedIn-post-card default, glossy 3D objects, glow, bloom, flares, light trails, shiny/specular/reflection cues, bokeh/orbs, hard gradient edges, SVG/vector look, photoreal stock-photo look, more than two background colors, angled perspective, isometric view, tilted panels, 3D depth, shadows, or three-quarter UI view.
